The numbers
behind the wait

The law may be clear. The admin isn't.

Barriers advocates
face every day

Manual paperwork and fragmented records create administrative nightmares that no advocate should have to endure.

Lost Case
Documents

Critical exhibits, affidavits, and pleadings get buried in stacks of paper with no organised retrieval system.

Check the solution

Overflowing
Filing Cabinets

Physical records accumulate with no searchability, making retrieval a time-intensive ordeal before every hearing.

Check the solution

Missed Hearing
Deadlines

Juggling multiple matters with handwritten diaries leads to overlooked court dates and costly adjournments.

Check the solution

No Searchable
Case History

Finding precedents and past briefs across hundreds of paper files takes hours that advocates simply don't have.

Check the solution
